channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: OpenAI drops teen-safety gear you can actually use. 🛡️ Real-time prompts, open-weight model, practical filters. Dive into the toolkit. https://Blockchain.News/news/openai-releases-open-source-teen-safety-tools-ai-developers #AISafety #OpenSource #TechNews
